name_en: 🆕 【 M83476 Black Embossed 】This Noa small wallet is crafted from the classic Monogram embossed canvas in a compact square design, featuring a distinctive L-shaped zipper closure. The interior features a colorful leather lining. The wallet includes six card slots and a spacious fold-over pocket. 11 x 8.5 x 1.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
